name: Apple Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the sugar and shortening until crumbly.
2. Add eggs and mix at low speed until blended.
3. Stir together flour, nutmeg, and cinnamon; add to sugar mixture, blending well.
4. Stir in apples and walnuts until all coated completely.
5. Dissolve baking soda in hot water and stir into batter.
6. Pour into a greased and floured square baking dish and bake at 375°F until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean - approximately 35 to 45 minutes.
